# gss_set_cred_option(_:_:_:_:)

**Function**

Changes a credential option.

## Declaration

```swift
func gss_set_cred_option(_ minor_status: UnsafeMutablePointer<OM_uint32>, _ cred_handle: UnsafeMutablePointer<gss_cred_id_t?>?, _ object: gss_OID, _ value: gss_buffer_t?) -> OM_uint32
```

## Parameters

- **minor_status**: A pointer to the secondary status result that provides additional information in case of failure.
- **cred_handle**: The credential to update.
- **object**: An object identifier that indicates the characteristic of the credential that should be changed.
- **value**: The new value for the named object.

## Return Value

A status code set to [doc://com.apple.gss/documentation/GSS/GSS_S_COMPLETE] on success. See [doc://com.apple.gss/documentation/GSS/function-status] for a description of other status outputs.

## Allocation and Deallocation

- **GSSCreateCredentialFromUUID(_:)**: Creates a credential from a universally unique identifier.
- **gss_add_cred(_:_:_:_:_:_:_:_:_:_:_:)**: Adds a new credential element to an existing credential.
- **gss_release_cred(_:_:)**: Releases the memory of a credential.
- **gss_destroy_cred(_:_:)**: Purges a credential from memory.
